title: stelis xiphizusa
intro: Stelis xiphizusa, also known as the Xiphizusa orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Stelis xiphizusa are said to include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
